$comment: Repo-local config for the spec/dev/qa/ship board sweeps. Nothing in the skills is hardcoded; they read this file.
$comment_runtime: Which agent CLI the auto-sweep launcher dispatches for this workspace, and the per-sweep model + reasoning effort. Keep explicit supported best-model overrides here so scheduled sweeps do not silently drift with runtime defaults.
$comment_parallel: Default bounded non-ship parallelism. Set maxNonShipDispatches to 1 for serial mode; that workspace runs alone or waits for the next tick. ship-sweep always stays serial.
$comment_reviewLenses: Card-type gating for review lenses: a card carrying any of a lens's labels fires that lens.
$comment_requireShipApproval: Optional. When true, ship-sweep requires a human-applied `ship:approved` label in addition to the card being in 'Ready to Ship' before it will merge.
$comment_fastPath: Enabled by default. Dev-sweep may mark tiny, high-confidence, low-risk changes with `fast-path:eligible`; a human can then move the card from In Review directly to Ready to Ship to skip QA Passed. Set enabled to false to require normal QA Passed for every card. ship-sweep still merges only from human-moved Ready to Ship.
deploy: No production app deploy for this kit. Shipping is merge/push to main; any release publishing or external distribution step must be attended by the owner or tracked as a Todo card.
credentialsNote: Linear API key in gitignored .env; no app secrets are required for this repo.
